title: ESB concentration risk
description: Multiple critical transaction flows depend on ESB availability
mitigation: Define resilience monitoring and failover plan

title: Incomplete data classification
description: Some applications may not have complete data classification
mitigation: Complete application and data inventory classification

title: Local authentication exception
description: Some legacy applications may not use centralized SSO

title: Technology lifecycle uncertainty
description: EOL dates are not fully maintained in technology inventory
mitigation: Update lifecycle data and remediation roadmap

title: Proposed onboarding app privacy gap
description: Consent and retention requirements for proposed onboarding flow are not yet defined
mitigation: Define privacy data flow and retention controls
